calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Ruth H. Downes, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Lillian H. Mirzabagi.
Declaration of Richard Cameron pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A. and against Defendant Lillian H. Mirzabagi as follows:
Damages in the amount of $3,990.76
Costs in the amount of $284.00
Total amount of $4,274.76

Judgment signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Set For Trial On Nov-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
